caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white shirt, a dark vest, and a red tie, stands behind a microphone and performs for an audience. He appears to be singing or speaking while holding an acoustic guitar. In front of him, several people are seated with their backs to the camera, including women with blonde and brown hair. The setting is indoors, featuring a wall with light-brown horizontal wooden slats. A black microphone on a stand is positioned directly in front of the performer. The white text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, though his facial expression and head tilt shift slightly as he performs. The audience members remain still, focusing their attention toward the stage.
